nodes.text: Garrick hammers at his anvil. 'Need gear? Build a workbench and commission what you need.'

responses.text: Why is iron gear so costly here?
Iron prices seem to be dropping.
What do I need for a workbench?
How are my orders coming along?

nodes.text: 'No ore in Mossveil Hollow yet — every blade and nail is freighted in. Sell iron here and prices will ease as the town learns to smith locally.'
'The market's glutted with iron. My commissions and Sera's freighted blades both come cheaper now.'
'Upgrade the workbench in town — oak wood and gold. Once it's built, use the Craft panel to place orders. I work one piece a day.'
'Open my Craft panel in Services — pick a recipe and place an order. Pay materials and gold up front; I deliver after a day's work. Upgrade the workbench and I can finish two orders per rest day.'
'Still at the forge. Rest, sleep, or stay at the inn — finished work arrives when the day turns.'
